verses.text: Note khatlekhat thu na kineih uh ciangin Pasian' mi siangthote khensakzaw loin lawki thukhente' mai na kitun' ngam uh hi
Pasian' mite in leitung mite' thu a khensakzaw ding ahihlam theilo na hi uh hiam? Note pen leitung mite' thu a khensak ding na hih uh ciangin tua bang thu neute khen theilo lawmlawm na hi uh hiam
Eite pen vantung mite' thu nangawn a khensak ding ihih lamtak theilo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih manin hih leitunga no' thu neuneute leltak na khentheih zawk kan ding uh ahi hi
Tua bang hinapi-in hih bang thu themthem hong pian' ciangin pawlpi sungah bangmahin a kisimlo mite' mai kitun'ding na hi uh hiam
Note-a' dingin zumhuai mahmah hi. Note khatlekhat na kithu-neihnate uh a khenthei ding note lakah mipil khat beek om buang ding hi
Tua hinapi, khatlekhat thu kineihin zum na kitun' uh a, lawki thukhente na khensak tazen uh hi
Note khatlekhat zum na kitut mahmah uh zong a gina hetlo na hihna uh hong kilangsak hi. Bang hangin thuakzaw mailo a, sum ngamzaw mailo na hi uh hiam
Note khatlekhat kisu-in, khatlekhat na kisut zawsop uh a, na sanggamte teekteek nangawn uh tawh thu na nei uh hi
Migilote, Pasian' Ukna sungah a lut hetlohna ding thu na thei uh hi. Note kihaibawl kei un. Numei tawh a paktatte, milim biate, mi zi ahih kei leh mi pasal tawh a mawhte, pasal leh pasal a khialte
a gutate, a huaihamte, zukhamte, mi gensiate, ahih kei leh mi' na a sutte khat beek, Pasian' Ukna sungah lutthei hetlo ding hi

Note pawlkhat, tua bangin na gamta uh hi. Ahi zongin note pen i Topa Jesuh Khrih leh i Pasian' Kha Siangtho hangin mawhna panin a hong kisiangsak khinsa, Pasian' tungah a kipiasa, Pasian tawh a kipawlsa mite na hi uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Minthan'na dingin Pumpi Zang Ding

verses.text: “Ka ut peuhpeuh ka hihtheihna ding thu om hi,” a ci omkha ding hi. Ahi zongin na khempeuh hihding kilawmlo hi. Kei zong ka ut khempeuh ka hih theih hangin tua bang gamtatna khat peuhpeuh' sila ka suak nuam kei hi

“An pen i gilpi-a' ding hi a, gilpi zong an-a' ding mah hilo ahi hiam?” a ci zong omkha ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in tuate gel a beisak hun hong tung ding hi. Pumpi pen paktatna-in zatding hilo a, Topa' na sepna-in zatding hizaw hi. Topa in pumpi-a' ding na hong sem hi
Pasian in sihna panin Topa thosak kik hi. Tua mah bangin eite zong ama vangliatna tawh hong thosak kik ding hi
Na pumpi uh, Khrih pumpi nate khat ahih lamtak theilo na hi uh hiam? Khrih pumpi nate khat la-in numei tawh paktatte' pumpi nate khat suaksak ding ihi hiam? Tuacih ngeiding hi peuhmahlo hi

Numei paktat tawh a pumpi a kizomsakpa pen tua numei tawh pumkhat sakhat a suak ahih lamtak theilo na hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Tua mi nihte pumkhat a suak ding uh hi,” na ci hi
Ahi zongin Topa tawh a kizomte pen kha thu tawh kisai-in amah tawh pumkhat ahi uh hi
Numei tawh mawhna na pelh un. Mi khat in a bawl mawhna tuamtuamte in ama pumpi sukhalo hi, a ci om hi. Ahi zongin numei tawh a mawhte, ama pumpi tungah a khial ahi hi
Na pumpi uh, Pasian in a hong piak, note' sungah a teng Kha Siangtho' biakinn ahih lamtak theilo na hi uh hiam? Note' pumpi, nomau' neihsa hilo a, Pasian-a' ahi hi
Note pen Pasian in a hong leisa na hih manun na pumpi uh Pasian' minthan'na dingin na zang un.
